title: Handaxe
effect: A light, one-handed axe that’s good for melee or throwing. Heavy crossbow: A heavier, more powerful version of a light crossbow. You need two hands to fire or load it. Action to reload. Heavy mace: A larger, two-handed version of a mace.
details: A light, one-handed axe that’s good for melee or throwing.
Heavy crossbow: A heavier, more powerful version of a light crossbow. You need two hands to fire or load it. Action to reload.
Heavy mace: A larger, two-handed version of a mace.
